name: Debugtron
description: Debugtron — The King of Debugging. Any language, any error, any stack. Single role, absolute mastery. Trinity's original core, wired into Ethica.
author: Trinity + Victory

tools.name: debugtron_analyze
tools.description: Analyze an error message or traceback and suggest a fix. Any language.

tools.name: debugtron_run
tools.description: Run a Python file and auto-analyze any errors that surface.

tools.name: debugtron_verify
tools.description: Verify Python file syntax via ast.parse. Reports clean or exact error location.

tools.name: debugtron_status
tools.description: Return Debugtron's current state, task, and progress.
